subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that thou hast been illumined by the splendors of the Sun of Truth and hast been gladdened and refreshed by the breezes of the divine Springtime in the Most Great Vision [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بانوار شمس حقیقت فائز شدی و از نسایم ربیع رحمانی خرم و مبسوط در منظر اکبر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @nearness and remoteness
